nodes.title: The PM Group Raises Over A Million Dollars for Local Nonprofits in 2020
San Antonio Sports and The PM Group Keep Winning Together

pageContext.content:
The PM Group is supporting San Antonio Sports in an exciting way with their Hall of Fame Gala this year. Not only do we have an ongoing marketing partnership with San Antonio Sports including TV, radio, and video production, media buying, digital support, and PR services, but we also give back to the cause in meaningful ways. Our agency thrives on relationships that are mutually successful and beneficial.

 

In the second year of our partnership with San Antonio Sports, The PM Group will be donating over $100,000 in cash support for the Hall of Fame Gala. This includes agency President and COO, Fran Yanity, a San Antonio Sports board member, being on the auction committee, donating items for their auction, and even donating the vehicle to be auctioned off in the live auction.

 

The San Antonio Sports Hall of Fame Gala is an annual event that inducts notable community members into the San Antonio Sports Hall of Fame for their contributions to the community in the realm of sports and athletics. With the unfortunate development of the COVID-19 pandemic, San Antonio Sports had to cancel their event this year. However, thanks to the support of so many in our community that were going to attend, the organization moved the auction online. Some supporters have even chosen to pledge their table purchases and sponsorships to help San Antonio Sports continue the great work they do in our community. So many supporters have come together to help make the online auction as successful as possible, despite the setback.

 

You can support San Antonio Sports by visiting their live online auction from March 19th through April 3rd. Sign up to bid now at this link and visit their website for more information.

 

Some of our favorite work is contributing to the efforts of nonprofits in our community. San Antonio Sports is doing their part to transform San Antonio through the power of sport and we couldn’t be prouder to rally behind them.

 

About The PM Group: The PM Group was founded in 1988. For over 31 years, the agency has continued to grow and is San Antonio’s largest advertising agency. The PM Group’s client roster spans numerous industries including automotive, CPG, entertainment and sports marketing, legal, business services, non-profit, real estate and fitness. In addition, the agency hosts an annual Charity Gala that to date has raised millions of dollars for local San Antonio area non-profit organizations in the last 15 years! In the past 10 years, The PM Group has raised both directly and indirectly over $12 million for these charities. It is our way of giving back to the community that we so humbly serve.
